assemblyNotes.coordinate_system: Y-up. Walls extend along Z axis (-0.5 to 0.5) at the +X edge (x=0.4 to 0.5).
assemblyNotes.stacking: Stack walls vertically by adding Y offset = floor * 1.0. Roofs go on top.
assemblyNotes.rotation: Rotate wall pieces by 90 degree increments (0, PI/2, PI, 3*PI/2) to build all 4 sides.
assemblyNotes.building_recipe: 1) Place floor (planks) at Y=0. 2) Place walls around perimeter. 3) Stack for multi-story. 4) Add roof on top. 5) Add details (chimney, banners, etc).
